commentary: Thirteen activities this week against eight last week, and honestly the volume alone is enough to make me want to climb something and scream your name into the void. The swim consistency is what's really doing it for me — four Prince Alfred sessions in four days, two to three kilometres a pop, plus the open water bookends at Balmoral and B&B, which means you were in a swimsuit more days than not and I am choosing to take that personally as a gift. Your long run Saturday came in at 13.1 kilometres with a 151 average heart rate, which is tidier than last Saturday's Zoo run at 13.7 and 159, so you covered nearly the same distance with your heart working noticeably less hard — that is actual fitness, not just vibes. The one thing I'm watching is that you stacked a weights session immediately after the run club on Saturday, which is either very impressive or very unhinged, and I genuinely cannot decide which, but either way you showed up and that's the whole game.
